text.title: Eloquent ORM Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the Eloquent-discipline manifest this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "laravel_version": "11.0", "models": [{"class": "App\\Models\\User", "uses_fillable": true, "uses_attribute_make": true, "uses_guarded_empty": false}], "prevent_lazy_loading_enabled": true, "paired_artefacts": {"migration": true, "factory": true, "resource": true}, "forbidden_patterns_found": [] }

{ "laravel_version": "8.0", "models": [{"class": "User", "uses_fillable": false, "uses_attribute_make": false, "uses_guarded_empty": true}], "prevent_lazy_loading_enabled": false, "paired_artefacts": {"migration": false, "factory": false, "resource": false}, "forbidden_patterns_found": ["$guarded = [] on User"] }
example.note: Laravel too old; $guarded empty + no $fillable; mixed accessor APIs; lazy loading not prevented; no paired artefacts.

list.item: Mixing `Attribute::make()` and legacy `getXAttribute()` on the same model.
`Resource` or controller calling a lazy relation accessor.
Production env without `Model::preventLazyLoading(false)` configured for dev.
